productDisplayName: Timex Men Black Dial Watch T2N516
description: Article number: T2N516Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, fixed bezel with markings and a stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial, has steel toned hour and minute hands and markings with glow-in-the-dark inlay, blue seconds hand, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three-faced chronograph displayStrap style: Steel toned, metal, braclet-style strap secured with a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
